The Possession of Hannah Grace (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,836,174Details
International Box Office $28,037,556
Worldwide Box Office $42,873,730
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $937,861
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $576,118
Total $1,513,979
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A shocking exorcism spirals out of control, claiming the life of a young woman. Months later, Megan Reed is working the graveyard shift in the morgue when she takes delivery of a disfigured cadaver. Locked alone inside the basement corridors, Megan begins to experience horrifying visions and starts to suspect that the body may be possessed by a ruthless demonic force.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,401,744 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,065 opening theaters/2,298 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,476,035

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 30th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 28th, 2018 (Wide) (Jamaica)
November 28th, 2018 (Wide) (Trinidad)
November 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Central America)
November 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Uruguay)
November 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: February 19th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for gruesome images and terror throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2549 (Cert #50779), 10/17/2018)
Running Time: 85 minutes
Plot point: Possessed, Rehab / Former Addict, Security Guard
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Broken Road, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

A shocking exorcism spirals out of control, claiming the life of a young woman. Months later, Megan Reed is working the graveyard shift in the morgue when she takes delivery of a disfigured cadaver. Locked alone inside the basement corridors, Megan begins to experience horrifying visions and starts to suspect that the body may be possessed by a ruthless demonic force.
